module.name: src
module.purpose: Second-generation Rust source organized into client, agent, and common modules with deployable typed configuration, runtime Marix path defaults and role-specific overrides, config-gated common logging, an interactive streaming CLI interface, DefaultPreview and ToolPreview-based client tool advertising, category.rs-backed CategoryPreview metadata, folder-organized native tool preview lists, a minimal agent binary entrypoint, directional chat envelopes and segments, centralized external-library namespaces, remoc-backed session/task endpoints, and a minimal single-request loop-engine runtime.

childModules.name: client
childModules.purpose: Client-facing draft with interactive CLI, remoc-backed core session/task endpoint, streamed response receives, executor/tool interfaces, ToolRegistry DefaultPreview/tool_preview advertising, CategoryPreview category metadata from category.rs plus category leaf files, and folder-organized native tools exposed as preview lists.

childModules.name: agent
childModules.purpose: Agent public surface for a minimal loop engine runtime with direct task-context state fields, remoc-backed frontdoor session/task endpoints, streamed chat response segments, model backend selection, model backend implementations, and a marker-free minimal agent binary main entrypoint that reads bind address from agent config and serves accepted clients.

childModules.name: common
childModules.purpose: Shared interfaces including typed TOML configuration with runtime Marix path resolution, config-gated logging under the selected runtime Marix path, fallible loading, directional chat request/response messages, shared channel errors, remoc session protocol messages, and centralized crate-local external-library namespaces.
